title: XOR
reason: star_1 -- Simon TathamのXOR演算子解説記事。純粋なコンピュータサイエンス基礎（ブール論理、ビット演算）でAI/LLM/エージェントとの関連なし。
body_excerpt: Recently I was called on to explain the 'XOR' operator to somebody who vaguely knew of its existence, but didn't have a good intuition for what it was useful for and how it behaved.

title: In which I have Opinions about parsing and grammars
reason: star_2 -- Simon Tathamのパース・文法エッセイ。パーサジェネレータ、BNF、LL/LRパーサなど伝統的コンパイラ論。AIパーサ技術とは無関係。
body_excerpt: I've been interested in parsing since I was a teenager. I first got into the subject by reading the dragon book in the early 1990s.

title: Moon - Bartosz Ciechanowski
reason: star_1 -- Bartosz Ciechanowskiの月面インタラクティブ解説。天体力学・潮汐・重力の教育コンテンツ。AI/LLMとの関連なし。
body_excerpt: Let's take a look at the Moon as seen from space in all its sunlit glory. You can drag it around to change your point of view.

title: Inside the NVIDIA Vera Rubin Platform: Six New Chips, One AI Supercomputer
reason: star_3 -- NVIDIA Vera Rubinプラットフォーム技術記事。既存conceptページ concepts/nvidia-vera-rubin.md が本記事をsourceとして2026-05-14に作成済み。重複。
body_excerpt: Inside the NVIDIA Vera Rubin Platform: Six New Chips, One AI Supercomputer | NVIDIA Technical Blog... Jan 05, 2026 By Kyle Aubrey...

title: Extreme Harness Engineering for Token Billionaires: 1M LOC, 1B toks/day - Ryan Lopopolo, OpenAI Frontier
reason: star_3 -- Ryan LopopoloのExtreme Harness Engineering interview。1M LOC zero-human-code実験、Symphony、token billionaire。既存entityページ entities/ryan-lopopolo.md に2026-05-22更新で本記事内容が既に詳細反映済み。重複。
body_excerpt: We're proud to release this ahead of Ryan's keynote at AIE Europe. Move over, context engineering. Now it's time for Harness engineering and the age of the token billionaires.
